zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Woodford於1400年出生在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾時，他的父親Robert Woodford25歲，母親Isabel de Neville14歲。他於1424年之前與Alice Berkeley在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。他去世於1455年在英國英格蘭享年55歲。

nameMeanings.name: Woodford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from any of various places called with Old English wudu ‘wood’ + ford ‘ford’, such as Woodford in Cheshire, Cornwall, Essex, Northamptonshire, and Wiltshire. In Scotland, the name is derived from Woodford in Saint Boswells (Roxburghshire).
History: Thomas Woodford emigrated from Lincolnshire, England, to NY in 1690.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Woodford was born in 1400, in Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert Woodford, was 25 and his mother, Isabel de Neville, was 14. He married Alice Berkeley before 1424, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. He died in 1455, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 55.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Woodford(이)가 1400년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Woodford(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel de Neville(은)는 14세였다. 그는 1424년 이전 영국 잉글랜드에서 Alice Berkeley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1455년 영국 잉글랜드에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.
